resources.string: Assign a parent location to create a hierarchy (e.g., a City belongs to a Country, a Room belongs to a Building).
Describe sentence structure, rhythm, pacing, and stylistic flow.
Rules regarding slang, contractions, profanity, dialect, or vocabulary restrictions.
Things this voice should emphasize or consistently include.
Things this voice must avoid or minimize.
Rules for formatting internal thoughts, telepathy, text messages, or special dialogue.
